free_text: Cross sections measurement of krypton 78 to 86 isotopes
in the spallation of palladium and silver. A new semi-
empirical spallation formula in the Y to Ag target mass
Pure target foils of Pd(99.9% or 3N) and Ag(5N) were
stacked with monitor and guard Al(5N) foils. Exact
thickness(about 20 mum) was determined by weighing.
. No information on source of uncertainty.
